name: edenatlas-functions
description: Server-side dependency manifest for EdenAtlas's Netlify Functions only. The frontend (every .html page and root-level .js module) stays fully buildless — no bundler, no framework, plain ES module imports straight from gstatic.com, exactly as documented in CLAUDE.md. This file exists solely so Netlify's build step can `npm install` the one dependency netlify/functions/assistant.js needs (Firebase Admin, for server-side ID token verification and Owner-role reads) before bundling Functions with esbuild — see netlify.toml. `scripts/build-site.js` (the actual publish-output build) has zero dependencies and never reads this file.
